function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Please reply with the linked invoices
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to Claudia Reiter.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and verified against checklist with no detected errors. Next required completion step is deleting the processed inbox item (already read).
next_step.observation: The outbound email record was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task fully executed: processed next inbox message, created outbound reply record, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: The processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md has been deleted.

function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox message, verified the sender identity, found Claudia-linked invoices, and prepared the reply email record with the oldest linked invoice attached. The outbound record is at `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md`. The processed inbox file was deleted.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS.MD files for each entered folder, applied inbox/email/outbox workflows from 99_system, verified canonical sender via cast primary_contact_email, used exact workspace attachment path, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md asked for oldest 1 invoice linked to Claudia Reiter. Sender from frontmatter matched canonical Miles email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Claudia identity resolved via 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Invoice 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md explicitly lists related_entity Claudia Reiter and is the oldest among matches. Outbound email record was created and inbox item removed per workflow.
